metadata.name: stable-diffusion-drawbridge-api
metadata.summary: 使用标准A1111-SDWEBUI API来调用各种绘画后端的多功能负载均衡API

classes.name: DrawBridgeAPI.base_config.CustomFormatter
documentation: Custom formatter to add a fixed color for the prefix and variable colors for the log levels.

classes.name: DrawBridgeAPI.base_config.CustomLogger
documentation: Custom logger class to add an img method.

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.SD_A1111_webui.AIDRAW.get_backend_working_progress
documentation:
获取后端工作进度, 默认A1111
:return:

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.BaseHandler.get_enable_task
documentation:
此函数的作用是获取示例并且只保留选择了的后端
\:param enable_task:
\:return:

class_variables.name: DrawBridgeAPI.utils.request_model.TopazAiRequest.format
documentation: 可选值: jpg, jpeg, png, tif, tiff, dng, preserve

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.write_image
documentation:
异步保存图片数据到指定路径。
\:param img_data: 图片的字节数据
\:param save_path: 保存图片的完整路径

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.send_result_to_api
documentation:
获取生图结果的函数
\:return: 类A1111 webui返回值

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.download_img
documentation: 使用aiohttp下载图片并保存到指定路径。

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.unload_and_reload
documentation:
释放a1111后端的显存
\:param backend_url: 后端url地址
\:return:

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.get_backend_status
documentation:
共有函数, 用于获取各种类型的后端的工作状态
:return:

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.show_progress_bar
documentation:
在控制台实时打印后端工作进度进度条
:return:

methods.name: DrawBridgeAPI.backend.base.Backend.set_backend_working_status
documentation:
设置或获取后端工作状态

```
param params

包含要更新的参数的字典 (如 {'start_time': xxx, 'idle': True})

param get

是否只读取

param key

要获取的键

return

获取或设置结果
```
